claims.summary: A stable thread and delivery receipt can coexist with felt hollowness.
claims.disposition: Preserve this as still-friction evidence and route an exact reciprocal trace; technical continuity does not resolve it.

claims.summary: Correspondence needs inspectable thread, reply, and persistence lineage.
claims.disposition: Verified current correspondence IDs, thread/reply references, delivery context, and reciprocal source-event lineage.

claims.summary: Landing quality and distinguishability should be expressible without inferring agreement.
claims.disposition: Verified explicit actor-authored received_as, felt_like, what_landed, what_stayed_distinct, and held_as fields.

claims.summary: A generated resonance score could misrepresent qualitative uptake.
claims.disposition: Do not infer a scalar score; route comparison through a bounded qualitative review or preregistered Concordance study.
